title: Grant & Project Support Manager
unit: NAU Radiant Center for Remote Sensing
summary: Provide professional grant and project support for Radiant Center research teams—helping manage sponsored programs, compliance, timelines, and coordination across multidisciplinary remote sensing and engineering efforts.
highlights: Navigate the full sponsored-project lifecycle—from proposal intake and award setup through closeout—so PIs can stay focused on science.
Partner with faculty, Radiant staff, OVPR, and central offices to keep timelines, budgets, and compliance requirements aligned.
Produce clear documentation, funder-ready reports, and timely updates that keep teams and stakeholders on the same page.
